The '''music ball''' was a small, silver sphere that played [[Music/Legends|music]] when shaken. [[Throm Loro]] gave his wife [[Elscol Loro|Elscol]] a music ball for their third anniversary that played "[[Starlight by Moonlight]]."

{{Tech-stub}}
